_meta.purpose: TTC-homage transit route roster (Phase 31, Part-8 D1). One entry per game route: real TTC route number/name, mode, and an ordered list of street segments (street id from world/toronto/streets.ts STREET_DEFS + endpoint tokens) the build-time resolver (world/toronto/transitRoutes.ts) turns into a polyline. Endpoint tokens: "start"/"end" (the street's own resolved span endpoint) or another street's id (that street's centreline gives the along-coordinate where the two cross).
_meta.source: Haiku map-researcher pass, 2026-07-18 (part-8-density-life-flip.md Phase 31 block) — real-world TTC route facts (19 Bay 2021 renumber from 6, 84/185 Sheppard 2024 split replacing 85, 510 Spadina 2026 FIFA short-turn to Queens Quay, Line 1 underground at Yonge/Eglinton so no surface LRT there). Game adaptation clips every route to our 24-street table and loops it there-and-back at the clip points (never a real terminus/loop/garage).
_meta.note: Every route here is a stylized homage: generic in-house/pack vehicle models, a plain nearest-neighbour route-number board (no TTC roundel, wordmark, or livery scheme). See assets/credits.json (CREDITS.brandTrademarks) for the trademark disclaimer.

routes.name: Yonge
routes.note: The full-thermometer showpiece ride — Queens Quay to Finch, the whole spine.

routes.name: Bay
routes.note: Renumbered from route 6 in 2021; Bloor down to the harbourfront.

routes.name: Front
routes.note: Downtown Front St clip, Yonge to Church.

routes.name: Finch West
routes.note: West half of Finch Ave, split at the Finch Station hub.

routes.name: Finch East
routes.note: East half of Finch Ave, split at the Finch Station hub.

routes.name: Sheppard West
routes.note: West half of Sheppard Ave, split at Yonge.

routes.name: Sheppard Central
routes.note: 185 replaced route 85 west of Don Mills in 2024; east half of Sheppard on our map, split at Yonge.

routes.name: Eglinton
routes.note: Crosses Yonge at Eglinton — Line 5 is underground here, so correctly no surface LRT.

routes.name: Queens Quay
routes.note: York to Jarvis, the harbourfront ROW.

routes.name: Spadina
routes.note: College to Queens Quay — the 2026 FIFA-shortened pattern, matching reality.

routes.name: Bathurst
routes.note: Full length of Bathurst on our map (Bloor to the harbourfront).
